common.tagline: Find your true north in weight and lifestyle

hero.title: Steady guidance toward your goal — not another crash diet
hero.subtitle: Personalised coaching for sustainable weight and lifestyle change, in English or Spanish. Start with a free initial consult to see if we're a good fit.

how.title: How it works
how.step1Body: A relaxed, no-pressure call to understand your goals and answer your questions.
how.step2Body: A short, secure questionnaire so your plan is built around your real life.
how.step3Body: Nutrition, movement and habits — with check-ins and support along the way.

approach.title: Coaching, not clinical care
approach.body: This is lifestyle and weight coaching, not medical treatment. If anything in your health needs a doctor, we'll tell you and help you get the right care first.

disclaimer.text: SB My Weight Compass provides non-clinical lifestyle and weight coaching. It is not medical advice, diagnosis or treatment. Always consult your GP or a qualified health professional about your individual circumstances.
